CVE-2024-56431.title: oc_huff_tree_unpack in huffdec.c in libtheora in Theora through 1 ...
CVE-2024-56431.description: oc_huff_tree_unpack in huffdec.c in libtheora in Theora through 1.0 7180717 has an invalid negative left shift. NOTE: this is disputed by third parties because there is no evidence of a security impact, e.g., an application would not crash.
